behaviorsAudited: Any tool with <tool-error> envelope routes to ToolErrorView regardless of tool name (cross-cutting dispatch)
Tool error envelope takes precedence over per-tool envelopes (defensive ordering — a Bash error containing both <bash-stdout> and <tool-error> renders the error view)
createBridgeTool exposes renderToolUseErrorMessage(error) which formats the error message + tool name and dispatches to ToolErrorView, so upstream's error channel reaches the same renderer
ToolErrorView renders a red-bold '<toolName> error' header and the error message body; falls back to generic 'Tool error' header when no <tool-error-name> tag is present
message-adapter.formatStructuredToolError(toolName, message) produces the <tool-error-name>/<tool-error> envelope; omits the name tag when toolName is empty

edgeCasesAudited: renderToolUseErrorMessage with a string error produces the envelope with the string as the message
renderToolUseErrorMessage with an Error instance extracts .message
renderToolUseErrorMessage with an arbitrary object falls back to short JSON
Tool error envelope on an unrecognized tool name still routes to ToolErrorView
Tool error envelope wins over per-tool envelope when both present
ToolErrorView with no <tool-error-name> tag renders 'Tool error' header without the tool name prefix

issues.message: Defense-in-depth observation only (not a blocker for this row): the envelope construction at runtime/src/tui/openclaude/tool-stubs.tsx:440 and runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.ts:560-562 does not escape the literal substring '</tool-error>' inside the error message body. An adversarial or accidental error message containing that substring would close the envelope early and corrupt extractBridgeTag's output. The same concern applies to every per-tool envelope (none escape either), so the contract-wide solution is consistent treatment across all envelopes — this row mirrors the rest of the contract. Not declared on this row's edgeCases and not raised by the previous verdict as a blocker; tracked as an observation for the next contract-level pass.

behaviorEvidence.Any tool with <tool-error> envelope rout: Implementation: runtime/src/agenc/adapters/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.ts:66-68 (envelope check is tool-name-agnostic and runs first) + runtime/src/tui/openclaude/tool-stubs.tsx:399-402 (switch case dispatches to ToolErrorView). Tests: runtime/src/tools/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.test.ts:116-125 (table-level cross-tool assertion for Bash/XYZUnknown/FileRead) + runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:347-365 (end-to-end via createBridgeTool('Bash'/'FileRead'/'XYZ').renderToolResultMessage).
behaviorEvidence.Tool error envelope takes precedence ove: Implementation: runtime/src/agenc/adapters/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.ts:66-68 (the <tool-error> branch returns early before any per-tool envelope branch is checked at lines 69-104). Tests: runtime/src/tools/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.test.ts:127-135 (dispatch-table level) + runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:368-375 (end-to-end with mixed <bash-stdout>+<tool-error> input).
behaviorEvidence.createBridgeTool exposes renderToolUseEr: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/openclaude/tool-stubs.tsx:429-442 (builds <tool-error-name>/<tool-error> envelope and returns ToolErrorView). Tests: runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:404-417 (string + Error instance) and 443-453 (cross-tool sweep over Bash/Edit/FileRead/Write/Grep/Glob/XYZUnknown).
behaviorEvidence.ToolErrorView renders a red-bold '<toolN: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/openclaude/tool-stubs.tsx:250-265 (extracts tool-error-name and tool-error tags; conditional header text). Tests: runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:377-391 (named header 'FileRead error' + body) + 393-402 (fallback 'Tool error' when name tag absent).
behaviorEvidence.message-adapter.formatStructuredToolErro: Implementation: runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.ts:549-565 (conditional name block + unconditional error block). Tests: runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.test.ts:432-454 (named, name-omitted, and empty-message cases).

edgeCaseEvidence.renderToolUseErrorMessage with a string: runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:404-408 (asserts ToolErrorView dispatch for string 'permission denied'); the string branch lives at runtime/src/tui/openclaude/tool-stubs.tsx:434.
edgeCaseEvidence.renderToolUseErrorMessage with an Error: runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:410-417 (Error('ENOENT') asserts <tool-error>ENOENT</tool-error> + <tool-error-name>FileRead</tool-error-name>); the Error-extraction branch lives at runtime/src/tui/openclaude/tool-stubs.tsx:435-438.
edgeCaseEvidence.renderToolUseErrorMessage with an arbitr: runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:419-427 (plain object {code:17, kind:'EEXIST'} asserts envelope contains 'EEXIST' and '17', proving JSON.stringify path); the shortJson fallback lives at runtime/src/tui/openclaude/tool-stubs.tsx:439.
edgeCaseEvidence.Tool error envelope wins over per-tool e: runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:368-375 (Bash tool with mixed <bash-stdout>+<tool-error> still dispatches to ToolErrorView).
